_comment: Naming ruleset — gates feature-branch names on ALL non-default branches. Applied by setup-repo.sh alongside the per-repo gate ruleset. Allowed types: feat|fix|chore|docs|refactor|test|perf|ci|factory, then '/<slug>' (lowercase, dotted/dashed). enforcement starts 'evaluate'; flip to 'active' once teams are used to it.
name: factory-naming
